DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC | Grade 12 | HS Visual & Performing Arts: Media Arts 11-12 | ELPAC L2 | NWEA 1400L+

The Festival Cut

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a student. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What is the main topic of the conversation?
2QUESTION 2: According to the student, why does she want the documentary to screen at the Karen community center before the festival cut is finished?
3QUESTION 3: Based on the full conversation, what does the teacher imply is the most important purpose of the student's distribution sequence?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. What is the girl trying to accomplish across her two turns, and how does the safety reason she names in the first turn shape what the teacher concludes about the festival cut at the end?
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5, PI.B.6  |  CA Media Arts Pr6a (11-12)  |  HS Visual & Performing Arts: Media Arts 11-12
